title: 顺序关系怎么承载
prompt: Create a polished 16:9 Chinese slide. Title: 顺序关系怎么承载. Compare two stable orchestration layers: TaskCommandOrderEdge for task-internal command order, and FeatureTaskOrderEdge for feature-level task order. Use a left-right comparison layout with one task command chain example: ADD URR -> ADD URRGROUP -> ADD PCCPOLICYGRP, and one feature task sequence example: 配置计费动作链 -> 配置 Rule -> 配置 UserProfile 与绑定 -> 配置缺省费率/刷新. Add one concise note: 方案级完整顺序当前不进入主 schema.
